title: elymus clivorum
intro: Elymus clivorum, also known as Clivicium grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus clivorum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions.
